    RtfParserKmp
rtf-core/com.darkrockstudios.libs.rtfparserkmp.rtf/Command

Command

enum Command : Enum<Command> (source)

Enumeration of all RTF commands, mapping each control-word keyword to its CommandType.

commandType

val commandType: CommandType
entries

val entries: EnumEntries<Command>

Returns a representation of an immutable list of all enum entries, in the order they're declared.

Functions

valueOf
Link copied to clipboard
fun valueOf(value: String): Command

Returns the enum constant of this type with the specified name. The string must match exactly an identifier used to declare an enum constant in this type. (Extraneous whitespace characters are not permitted.)

values
Link copied to clipboard
fun values(): Array<Command>

Returns an array containing the constants of this enum type, in the order they're declared.
